review: If I lived in Philly this would definitely be the perfect pre game spot. It's chill, affordable and they have unlimited drinks to choose from. I was pretty basic in my food choice. I got the grilled cheese and fries on the side. I mean there is no way they could mess it up, but MAN it was good! I also had so many cider options that I choose from, their choices aren't only limited to beer. I wish they had one of these in NYC.
